frontmatter.title: 練習問題メモ 10（特別な形をした行列式）

children.value: ヴァンデルモンドの行列式について、次の問いに答えよ。

children.html: ∣111123122232∣\left|\begin{array}{ccc}1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 3 \\ 1^2 & 2^2 & 3^2\end{array}\right|∣∣​1112​1222​1332​∣∣​

children.value: をサラスの方法とヴァンデルモンドの行列式を用いる方法の 2 通りで計算せよ。

children.html: ∣111123122232∣=2×32+3+22−2−32−22×3=18+3+4−2−9−12=21+4−2−21=2\left|\begin{array}{ccc}1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 3 \\ 1^2 & 2^2 & 3^2\end{array}\right| = 2\times 3^2 + 3 + 2^2 - 2 - 3^2 - 2^2 \times 3\\ = 18 + 3 + 4 - 2 - 9 - 12\\ = 21 + 4 - 2 - 21\\ = 2∣∣​1112​1222​1332​∣∣​=2×32+3+22−2−32−22×3=18+3+4−2−9−12=21+4−2−21=2

∣111123122232∣=(2−1)(3−1)(3−2)=1×2×1=2\left|\begin{array}{ccc}1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 3 \\ 1^2 & 2^2 & 3^2\end{array}\right| = (2 - 1)(3- 1) (3- 2)\\ = 1 \times 2 \times 1\\ = 2∣∣​1112​1222​1332​∣∣​=(2−1)(3−1)(3−2)=1×2×1=2

∣111⋯1123⋯n122232⋯n2⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮1n−12n−13n−1⋯nn−1∣\left|\begin{array}{ccccc} 1 & 1 & 1 & \cdots & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 3 & \cdots & n \\ 1^2 & 2^2 & 3^2 & \cdots & n^2 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ 1^{n-1} & 2^{n-1} & 3^{n-1} & \cdots & n^{n-1} \end{array}\right|∣∣​1112⋮1n−1​1222⋮2n−1​1332⋮3n−1​⋯⋯⋯⋱⋯​1nn2⋮nn−1​∣∣​

(2−1)(3−1)×⋯×(n−1)×(3−2)(4−2)×⋯×(n−2)⋮×(n−(n−1))(2-1)(3-1)\times \cdots \times (n-1)\\ \times (3-2)(4-2)\times \cdots \times (n-2)\\ \vdots\\ \times (n-(n-1))(2−1)(3−1)×⋯×(n−1)×(3−2)(4−2)×⋯×(n−2)⋮×(n−(n−1))
=1×2×⋯×(n−1)×1×2×⋯×(n−2)⋮×1=1 \times 2 \times \cdots \times (n-1)\\ \times 1 \times 2 \times \cdots \times (n-2)\\ \vdots\\ \times 1=1×2×⋯×(n−1)×1×2×⋯×(n−2)⋮×1
=(n−1)!×(n−2)!×⋯×(n−(n−1))!=1!×2!×⋯×(n−1)!= (n-1)! \times (n-2)! \times \cdots \times (n-(n-1))!\\ = 1! \times 2! \times \cdots \times (n-1)!=(n−1)!×(n−2)!×⋯×(n−(n−1))!=1!×2!×⋯×(n−1)!

children.value: 次の 1～2 の行列式を計算せよ

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x & a_1 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
a_1 & x & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
a_1 & a_2 & x & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\
a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & x & 1 \\
a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n & 1
\end{array}\right|
children.html: ∣xa1a2⋯an−11a1xa2⋯an−11a1a2x⋯an−11⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮a1a2a3⋯x1a1a2a3⋯an1∣\left|\begin{array}{cccccc} x & a_1 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ a_1 & x & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ a_1 & a_2 & x & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\ a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & x & 1 \\ a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n & 1 \end{array}\right|∣∣​xa1​a1​⋮a1​a1​​a1​xa2​⋮a2​a2​​a2​a2​x⋮a3​a3​​⋯⋯⋯⋱⋯⋯​an−1​an−1​an−1​⋮xan​​111⋮11​∣∣​

∣xa11a1x1a1a21∣=x2+a12+a1a2−a1x−a12−a2x=x2−a1x−a2x+a1a2=(x−a1)(x−a2)\left|\begin{array}{ccc} x & a_1 & 1\\ a_1 & x & 1\\ a_1 & a_2 & 1\\ \end{array}\right| = x^2 + a_1^2 + a_1 a_2 - a_1 x - a_1^2 - a_2 x\\ = x^2 - a_1 x - a_2 x + a_1 a_2\\ = (x - a_1)(x - a_2)∣∣​xa1​a1​​a1​xa2​​111​∣∣​=x2+a12​+a1​a2​−a1​x−a12​−a2​x=x2−a1​x−a2​x+a1​a2​=(x−a1​)(x−a2​)
n+1n+1n+1
a1a_1a1​

children.value: を掛けて第1列から引く

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x-a_1 & a_1 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
0 & x & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
0 & a_2 & x & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\
0 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & x & 1 \\
0 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n & 1
\end{array}\right|

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x-a_1 & a_1-a_2 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
0 & x-a_2 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\

\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\

children.html: ∣x−a1a1−a2a2⋯an−110x−a2a2⋯an−1100x⋯an−11⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮00a3⋯x100a3⋯an1∣\left|\begin{array}{cccccc} x-a_1 & a_1-a_2 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ 0 & x-a_2 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ 0 & 0 & x & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\ 0 & 0 & a_3 & \cdots & x & 1 \\ 0 & 0 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n & 1 \end{array}\right|∣∣​x−a1​00⋮00​a1​−a2​x−a2​0⋮00​a2​a2​x⋮a3​a3​​⋯⋯⋯⋱⋯⋯​an−1​an−1​an−1​⋮xan​​111⋮11​∣∣​
nnn

children.value: 列まで繰り返し、上三角行列にする

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x-a_1 & a_1-a_2 & a_2-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1}-a_n & 1 \\
0 & x-a_2 & a_2-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1}-a_n & 1 \\
0 & 0 & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1}-a_n & 1 \\
\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\
0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & x-a_n & 1 \\
0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & 0 & 1
\end{array}\right|
children.html: ∣x−a1a1−a2a2−a3⋯an−1−an10x−a2a2−a3⋯an−1−an100x−a3⋯an−1−an1⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮000⋯x−an1000⋯01∣\left|\begin{array}{cccccc} x-a_1 & a_1-a_2 & a_2-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1}-a_n & 1 \\ 0 & x-a_2 & a_2-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1}-a_n & 1 \\ 0 & 0 & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1}-a_n & 1 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & x-a_n & 1 \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & 0 & 1 \end{array}\right|∣∣​x−a1​00⋮00​a1​−a2​x−a2​0⋮00​a2​−a3​a2​−a3​x−a3​⋮00​⋯⋯⋯⋱⋯⋯​an−1​−an​an−1​−an​an−1​−an​⋮x−an​0​111⋮11​∣∣​

children.value: 三角行列の行列式は対角成分の積であるという性質より、

children.html: ∏i=1n(x−ai)\prod_{i=1}^n\left(x-a_i\right)i=1∏n​(x−ai​)

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x & a_1 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
a_1 & x & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
a_1 & a_2 & x & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\
\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\
a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & x & 1 \\
a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n & 1
\end{array}\right|
children.html: ∣xa1a2⋯an−11a1xa2⋯an−11a1a2x⋯an−11⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮a1a2a3⋯x1a1a2a3⋯an1∣\left|\begin{array}{cccccc} x & a_1 & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ a_1 & x & a_2 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ a_1 & a_2 & x & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 1 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\ a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & x & 1 \\ a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n & 1 \end{array}\right|∣∣​xa1​a1​⋮a1​a1​​a1​xa2​⋮a2​a2​​a2​a2​x⋮a3​a3​​⋯⋯⋯⋱⋯⋯​an−1​an−1​an−1​⋮xan​​111⋮11​∣∣​
1≤i<n1 \leq i < n1≤i<n

children.value: ）について、i+1行の-1倍を加えて上三角行列にする

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x-a_1 & a_1-x  & 0     & \cdots & 0       & 0 \\
0     & x-a_2  & a_2-x & \cdots & 0       & 0 \\
0     & 0      & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1} & 0 \\
\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\

\end{array}\right|

children.value: 回繰り返した→偶数回→行列式の符号は変わらず）

\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
1 & a_1    & a_2   & a_3 & \cdots & a_n\\
0 & x-a_1 & a_1-x  & 0     & \cdots & 0\\
0 & 0 & x-a_2  & a_2-x & \cdots & 0    \\
0 & 0     & 0      & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1} \\
\vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\

\end{array}\right|
children.html: ∣1a1a2a3⋯an0x−a1a1−x0⋯000x−a2a2−x⋯0000x−a3⋯an−1⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮0000⋯x−an∣\left|\begin{array}{cccccc} 1 & a_1 & a_2 & a_3 & \cdots & a_n\\ 0 & x-a_1 & a_1-x & 0 & \cdots & 0\\ 0 & 0 & x-a_2 & a_2-x & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1} \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & x-a_n \\ \end{array}\right|∣∣​1000⋮0​a1​x−a1​00⋮0​a2​a1​−xx−a2​0⋮0​a3​0a2​−xx−a3​⋱0​⋯⋯⋯⋯⋮⋯​an​00an−1​⋮x−an​​∣∣​

children.value: 三角行列の行列式は対角成分の積なので

1 \times
\left|\begin{array}{cccccc}
x-a_1 & a_1-x  & 0     & \cdots & 0\\
0 & x-a_2  & a_2-x & \cdots & 0    \\
0     & 0      & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1} \\
\vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\
0      & 0     & 0     & \cdots & x-a_n   \\
\end{array}\right|
= \prod_{i=1}^n\left(x-a_i\right)
children.html: 1×∣x−a1a1−x0⋯00x−a2a2−x⋯000x−a3⋯an−1⋮⋮⋱⋮⋮000⋯x−an∣=∏i=1n(x−ai)1 \times \left|\begin{array}{cccccc} x-a_1 & a_1-x & 0 & \cdots & 0\\ 0 & x-a_2 & a_2-x & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & x-a_3 & \cdots & a_{n-1} \\ \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots & \vdots \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & \cdots & x-a_n \\ \end{array}\right| = \prod_{i=1}^n\left(x-a_i\right)1×∣∣​x−a1​00⋮0​a1​−xx−a2​0⋮0​0a2​−xx−a3​⋱0​⋯⋯⋯⋮⋯​00an−1​⋮x−an​​∣∣​=i=1∏n​(x−ai​)

∣111⋯1121⋯1113⋯1⋮⋮⋮⋱⋮111⋯n∣\left|\begin{array}{ccccc} 1 & 1 & 1 & \cdots & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 1 & \cdots & 1 \\ 1 & 1 & 3 & \cdots & 1 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ 1 & 1 & 1 & \cdots & n \end{array}\right|∣∣​111⋮1​121⋮1​113⋮1​⋯⋯⋯⋱⋯​111⋮n​∣∣​

2 次の交代行列の行列式を直接計算し、上の事実を確かめよ。

children.html: A=(0a12−a120)A = \begin{pmatrix} 0 & a_{12}\\ -a_{12} & 0 \end{pmatrix}A=(0−a12​​a12​0​)

children.value: とすると、サラスの方法だと

children.html: ∣A∣=0−(−a12×a12)=a122|A| = 0 - (-a_{12} \times a_{12}) = a_{12}^2∣A∣=0−(−a12​×a12​)=a122​
∣A∣=P2|A| = P^2∣A∣=P2

A=(0a12a13a14−a120a23a24−a13−a230a34−a14−a24−a340)A = \begin{pmatrix} 0 & a_{12} & a_{13} & a_{14}\\ -a_{12} & 0 & a_{23} & a_{24} \\ -a_{13} & -a_{23} & 0 & a_{34} \\ -a_{14} & -a_{24} & -a_{34} & 0 \\ \end{pmatrix}A=⎝⎛​0−a12​−a13​−a14​​a12​0−a23​−a24​​a13​a23​0−a34​​a14​a24​a34​0​⎠⎞​

children.value: 第1行についての余因子展開を使うと

children.html: ∣A∣=a12a~12+a13a~13+a14a~14|A| = a_{12} \tilde{a}_{12} + a_{13} \tilde{a}_{13} + a_{14} \tilde{a}_{14}∣A∣=a12​a~12​+a13​a~13​+a14​a~14​

a~12=(−1)3∣−a12a23a24−a130a34−a14−a340∣=−1×(a13a34a24−a23a34a14−a12a342)=−a13a34a24+a23a34a14+a12a342\tilde{a}_{12} = (-1)^3 \left|\begin{array}{ccc} -a_{12} & a_{23} & a_{24} \\ -a_{13} & 0 & a_{34} \\ -a_{14} & -a_{34} & 0 \\ \end{array}\right| = -1 \times ( a_{13} a_{34} a_{24} - a_{23} a_{34} a_{14} - a_{12} a_{34}^2 )\\ = - a_{13} a_{34} a_{24} + a_{23} a_{34} a_{14} + a_{12} a_{34}^2a~12​=(−1)3∣∣​−a12​−a13​−a14​​a23​0−a34​​a24​a34​0​∣∣​=−1×(a13​a34​a24​−a23​a34​a14​−a12​a342​)=−a13​a34​a24​+a23​a34​a14​+a12​a342​

a~13=(−1)4∣−a120a24−a13−a23a34−a14−a240∣=a13a242−a14a23a24−a12a24a34\tilde{a}_{13} = (-1)^4 \left|\begin{array}{ccc} -a_{12} & 0 &a_{24} \\ -a_{13} & -a_{23} &a_{34} \\ -a_{14} & -a_{24} &0 \\ \end{array}\right| = a_{13} a_{24}^2 - a_{14} a_{23} a_{24} - a_{12} a_{24} a_{34}a~13​=(−1)4∣∣​−a12​−a13​−a14​​0−a23​−a24​​a24​a34​0​∣∣​=a13​a242​−a14​a23​a24​−a12​a24​a34​

a~14=(−1)3∣−a120a23−a13−a230−a14−a24−a34∣=−1×(−a12a23a34+a13a23a24−a14a232)=a12a23a34−a13a23a24+a14a232\tilde{a}_{14} = (-1)^3 \left|\begin{array}{ccc} -a_{12} & 0 & a_{23}\\ -a_{13} & -a_{23} & 0 \\ -a_{14} & -a_{24} & -a_{34}\\ \end{array}\right| = -1 \times ( - a_{12} a_{23} a_{34} + a_{13} a_{23} a_{24} - a_{14} a_{23}^2 )\\ = a_{12} a_{23} a_{34} - a_{13} a_{23} a_{24} + a_{14} a_{23}^2a~14​=(−1)3∣∣​−a12​−a13​−a14​​0−a23​−a24​​a23​0−a34​​∣∣​=−1×(−a12​a23​a34​+a13​a23​a24​−a14​a232​)=a12​a23​a34​−a13​a23​a24​+a14​a232​

∣A∣=a12a~12+a13a~13+a14a~14=a12(−a13a34a24+a23a34a14+a12a342)+a13(a13a242−a14a23a24−a12a24a34)+a14(a12a23a34−a13a23a24+a14a232)=−a12a13a34a24+a12a14a23a34+a122a342+a132a242−a13a14a23a24−a12a13a24a34+a12a14a23a34−a13a14a23a24+a142a232=2(a12a14a23a34)−2(a12a13a24a34)−2(a13a14a23a24)+a122a342+a132a242+a142a232=(a12a34−a13a24+a14a23)2\begin{align} |A| &= a_{12} \tilde{a}_{12} + a_{13} \tilde{a}_{13} + a_{14} \tilde{a}_{14} \\ &= a_{12} (- a_{13} a_{34} a_{24} + a_{23} a_{34} a_{14} + a_{12} a_{34}^2)\\ &\quad + a_{13} (a_{13} a_{24}^2 - a_{14} a_{23} a_{24} - a_{12} a_{24} a_{34})\\ &\quad + a_{14} (a_{12} a_{23} a_{34} - a_{13} a_{23} a_{24} + a_{14} a_{23}^2) \\ &= - a_{12} a_{13} a_{34} a_{24} + a_{12} a_{14} a_{23} a_{34} + a_{12}^2 a_{34}^2\\ &\quad + a_{13}^2 a_{24}^2 - a_{13} a_{14} a_{23} a_{24} - a_{12} a_{13} a_{24} a_{34}\\ &\quad + a_{12} a_{14} a_{23} a_{34} - a_{13} a_{14} a_{23} a_{24} + a_{14}^2 a_{23}^2 \\ &= 2(a_{12} a_{14} a_{23} a_{34})\\ &\quad - 2(a_{12} a_{13} a_{24} a_{34})\\ &\quad - 2(a_{13} a_{14} a_{23} a_{24})\\ &\quad + a_{12}^2 a_{34}^2 + a_{13}^2 a_{24}^2 + a_{14}^2 a_{23}^2\\ \\ &= (a_{12} a_{34}-a_{13} a_{24}+a_{14} a_{23})^2 \end{align}∣A∣​=a12​a~12​+a13​a~13​+a14​a~14​=a12​(−a13​a34​a24​+a23​a34​a14​+a12​a342​)+a13​(a13​a242​−a14​a23​a24​−a12​a24​a34​)+a14​(a12​a23​a34​−a13​a23​a24​+a14​a232​)=−a12​a13​a34​a24​+a12​a14​a23​a34​+a122​a342​+a132​a242​−a13​a14​a23​a24​−a12​a13​a24​a34​+a12​a14​a23​a34​−a13​a14​a23​a24​+a142​a232​=2(a12​a14​a23​a34​)−2(a12​a13​a24​a34​)−2(a13​a14​a23​a24​)+a122​a342​+a132​a242​+a142​a232​=(a12​a34​−a13​a24​+a14​a23​)2​​
P=±(a12a34−a13a24+a14a23)P = \pm (a_{12} a_{34}-a_{13} a_{24}+a_{14} a_{23})P=±(a12​a34​−a13​a24​+a14​a23​)

# 因数分解はsympyを使った
from sympy import symbols, factor, expand
a12, a13, a14, a23, a24, a34 = symbols("a12, a13, a14, a23, a24, a34")

F = 2 * (a12 * a14 * a23 * a34) - 2 * (a12 * a13 * a24 * a34) - 2 * (a13 * a14 * a23 * a24)\
    + a12**2 * a34**2 + a13**2 * a24**2 + a14**2 * a23**2
factor(F)
